changeSet.author: codex

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.test_section WHERE name = 'Virologie'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_departments nd JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON nd.notebook_id = n.id JOIN clinlims.test_section ts ON nd.test_section_id = ts.id WHERE n.title = 'Virology Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND ts.name = 'Virologie'

changeSet.comment: Link Virology Laboratory notebook template to Virologie department
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.notebook_departments (notebook_id, test_section_id) SELECT n.id, ts.id FROM clinlims.notebook n CROSS JOIN clinlims.test_section ts WHERE n.title = 'Virology Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND ts.name = 'Virologie'
